title: Tower Cerastone Forged Aluminium Casserole Pot with Ceramic Non-Stick Coating, Tempered Glass Lid, 28cm, Graphite
features: 28CM CASSEROLE POT: This 28cm casserole pot provides enough cooking space for family meals and entertaining, so you can dish up wholesome, slow-cooked casseroles and hearty stews with ease
SUPERIOR NON-STICK COATING: The multi-layer Cerastone coating is 5x stronger than other non-stick coatings, so you can enjoy healthy meals using little or no oil
QUALITY CONSTRUCTION: High quality, long-lasting forged aluminium body enables quick and easy adjustment of temperatures for more efficient cooking results, with no hot spots
FREE FROM CHEMICALS: Its Cerastone coating is PFAS, PFOA, PTFE, Lead and Cadmium free – ideal for any avid cook
SOFTTEX HANDLES: Softtex, non-slip handles for comfortable control over your cooking
SUITABLE FOR ALL HOB TYPES: The bonded steel base provides even heat distribution to ensure your food is cooked thoroughly, and is designed to work with any hob type including induction
DISHWASHER SAFE: The non-stick ceramic coating prevents food from sticking to the surface, and this casserole pot is dishwasher safe for an even easier clean after cooking
5 YEAR GUARANTEE: Trusted Tower quality with a standard 1 year manufacturer’s guarantee and a 4 year extension, subject to product registration online
description: From the manufacturer Our brand’s strength comes from its heritage – something that can’t be forged and something that allows us to continue offering highly desirable housewares products to a wide customer-base with unshakable brand loyalty. Quality, Innovation and Value Customers' Trusted Brand Healthy Cooking for Decades Desirable Electrical and Housewares Products Tower T81286 Cerastone Forged Aluminium Casserole Pot with Ceramic Non-Stick Coating, Tempered Glass Lid, 28cm, Graphite Healthy, hearty meals are easier than ever with the Tower Cerastone non-stick casserole dish Cook wholesome casseroles and hearty stews with the Tower Tower 28cm Casserole Pot. The Cerastone non-stick coating is 5x stronger than others and is PFAS, PFOA, PTFE, lead and cadmium-free. Its forged aluminium body is lightweight with Softtex handles for comfortable control, with a tempered glass lid that effectively seals in heat to retain rich flavours. Its bonded steel base provides even heat distribution to ensure your food is cooked evenly, and works with any hob type including induction. 28cm Casserole Pot with lid Cerasure ceramic non-stick coating Dishwasher suitable – hand wash recommended Suitable for all hob types, including induction PFAS, PFOA, PTFE, Lead and Cadmium free Graphite heat resistant exterior coating Do not use in the oven or grill Item dimensions: H5.3cm x W30cm x D30cm SOFTTEX HANDLE The sturdy Softtex handle with ergonomic, phenolic design stays cool to touch for a comfortable grip while cooking and serving CERASURE NON-STICK COATING The Cerasure ceramic non-stick coating is 3x stronger than others. Little oil is required for healthier eating, while the coating ensures food does not stick to the pan BONDED BASE Heating evenly with no hot spots, the robust bonded steel base provides even heat distribution, ensuring food is cooked thoroughly and evenly
